true_header: Confidentiality agreement 1
Confidentiality agreement
The parties maintain a supply relationship. in the frame of this cooperation,
The contract parties are obligated to preclude disclosure of confidential information to third parties.
All confidential information remains the property of the disclosing contract party.
The receiving party was already aware of or which was developed by the disclosing party itself independent of the disclosure,
Is publicly known without this agreement having been broken,
Was received by a third party without infringement of this or any other confidentiality agreement.
If the recipient is forced to expose the confidential information due to a legal regulation,
The confidential information will be provided as is.

Confidentiality, non-disclosure and conflict of interest agreement ver 1 adopted by the samed board on: november 2013
Confidentiality policy
Definitions
“agreement” means this confidentiality and non-disclosure agreement
"board" means the board of samed.
“board members” means members of the board.
“chair” means chair of the board.
"committee" means a committee of the board.
"committee members" means members of any committee.
"meeting" means a meeting of the board or a committee, as applicable.
"policy" means this confidentiality policy
“samed” means south african medical devices industry association
“vice-chair”, means vice-chair of the board
The information
Confidentiality
Regular  board  meetings  are,
Members of samed may on invitation attend board meetings.
Once the board has dealt with an issue in a board meeting and has decided on that matter,
All decisions that would be accessible to the general membership and/or the public at large will be recorded as such in the board minutes.
If no recordal is made, the matter,
When considering  whether matters are confidential or not,
The board also holds in-camera meetings,
Committees  are  advisory  to  the  board.
Conflict of interest
Any member of the samed board, executive,
Contract is defined as any written or verbal agreement between two or more parties for the doing or not doing of something specified which is related to the matter at hand.
Transaction is defined as an exchange of money, services, goods, position,
Interest  is  defined  as  any  instance  where  any  contract  or  transaction,
In the event of a conflict of interest, the interested party shall:
Prior to any vote on the issue,
Refrain from voting in relation to the matter.
Withdraw from the meeting when the matter is discussed if requested to do so by a simple majority of the members present and voting at the meeting.
Breaches
In the case of a breach by a board or committee member,
Terms
Additional action
Amendments
No amendment,
Entire agreement
Governing law
Severability

In the event of any one or more of the provisions of this agreement being held for any reason to be invalid, illegal or unenforceable in any respect, such invalidity, illegality or unenforceability  shall  not  affect  any  other  provision  of  this  agreement,  and  this agreement shall be construed as if such invalid, illegal or unenforceable provision was not  a  part  of  this  agreement,  and  the  agreement  shall  be  carried  out  as  nearly  as possible in accordance with its original terms and intent.

Non-disclosure agreement
By being granted conditional access to the information indicated above,
Hereby agree that i will not alter or remove markings,
Hereby agree that i shall promptly report to the appropriate official,
If i violate the terms and conditions of this agreement,
With respect to ssi and sbu,
Each provision of this agreement is severable.
These restrictions are consistent with and do not supersede, conflict with,
Represent and warrant that i have the authority to enter into this agreement.
Have read this agreement carefully and my questions, if any, have been answered.
Non disclosure agreement
Introduction
Are referring to the letter of agreement between nmod and gi concerning industrial participation in further development of gripen and related projects (the "loa");
Noting their wish to exchange  information  for the  purpose of conducting evaluations  of the gripen aircraft,
Noting that such exchange  of information  may involve the disclosure  of confidential  information  by either  party,

Noting that exchanging  information with  gi shall also include exchanging information  with  saab and upon such disclosure  saab shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions  contained  herein as if saab was a party to the  nda;

Noting that  exchanging  information with the  nmod shall also include other  norwegian authorities  and upon such disclosure  said norwegian authority  shall confirm  and be bound of the terms and conditions contained  herein as if said norwegian authority was a party to the  nda.
Clause 1
Clause 2

That it shall treat the confidential  information directly or indirectly disclosed to it by the  disclosing  party as strictly confidential  and will  not without obtaining  the  prior written  consent  of the  disclosing  party disclose  any part of the confidential  information to any third  party,
That it shall not make  use of any part of  the confidential information disclosed to it by the disclosing party,
That it shall give access to the  confidential  information only,
That it shall  not copy or reproduce  in any form  any of the confidential information  disclosed  to it by the  disclosing  party,
That it shall  keep a current  record of all copies and reproductions  of the confidential  information.
Clause 3
At the time of disclosure  or thereafter  available to the  public generally through  no failure  on the  part of the  receiving party;
Known to the  receiving party at the time of its disclosure;
Disclosed to the  receiving party by a third party having the  right to disclose confidential  information  and without  restrictions  as to use or disclosure;
Developed  independently  by the  receiving party without  use of or reference  to the confidential  information  received.
